context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Response animation when player pets/touches Echo
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, on perch at y=80
context.usage_scenario: Triggered by petting interaction, plays for 5 seconds then returns to idle

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with raised crest, body swaying side to side, wings slightly spread
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1-2: crest raises, Frame 3-4: body sways left with wings opening 2px, Frame 5-6: body sways right with wings opening 2px, Frame 7-8: return to center

visual_specification.details: Crest fully raised adding 6px to height, eyes wide open (2x2px), cheek patch prominent, wings spread outward by 2px on each side during sway, feet remain planted on perch, tail feathers fan slightly

relationships.shared_with: Same base colors as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (crest position and wing spread), echo_singing (no open beak)

explicit_negations: No beak opening (singing is separate state)
No color changes to indicate happiness
No continuous loop beyond 5 seconds (returns to idle)
